metadata.title: Live Hunting - Real Target Vulnerability Exploitation

steps.name: Live Recon & Scope Analysis
steps.content:
### 🎯 Live Hunting Mission
Perform active reconnaissance on a live enterprise target to discover unlinked assets and hidden API endpoints.

### 📜 Target Domain
`https://api-hunting.enterprise-live.com`

steps.name: Burp Intercept & Parameter Mining
steps.content:
### 📡 Burp Suite Analysis
Intercept API traffic and perform parameter mining to discover hidden parameters (`debug=true`, `admin=1`).

steps.name: Real-World Exploitation & Exfiltration
steps.content:
### 🔄 Live Exploitation
Inject parameter overrides in Burp Repeater to exfiltrate enterprise administrative session tokens.

Flag: `FLAG{LIVE_HUNTING_REAL_TARGET_MASTER_2026}`
